texto: [Giordano] Bruno died, despised and suffering, after eight years of agony. From that moment, his works have attracted interest, and he has long been recognized as an important figure in the development of modern thought. Nevertheless, few are familiar with the many and often bewildering pages of his writings. His Italian works have their place in the history of Italian literature. The Latin works in prose and verse are much more bulky and diffuse, but the few who grapple with them are rewarded by passages of great beauty and eloquence.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Dorothea Singer sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “[Giordano] Bruno died, despised and suffering, after eight years of agony. From that moment, his …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, astronomy, beauty, útil em momentos de trabalho e beauty.
